TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Bath Rugby v Saracens
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Bath Rugby v Saracens (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the match from The Recreation Ground. The last time these two sides met was at the end of November with Bath coming out on top thanks to an entertaining 36-29 victory. Saracens had led 22-17 at half-time before three tries in the second half from the hosts turned the game on its head. This is the first of two meetings between the two sides in the space of 15 days, with the next meeting coming in a round-of-16 tie in the European Champions Cup in early April.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: New Zealand v South Africa-2nd T20
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: New Zealand v South Africa. Coverage of the second T20 in the five-match series from Seddon Park in Hamilton. These two sides haven't met in a T20 series since a two-match contest back in 2015. South Africa won the first match by six wickets before the hosts replied with a 32-run victory to tie the series. Martin Guptill hit 60 for New Zealand in that second game to help the Kiwi's to 177-7 in their 20 overs, before South Africa were restricted to 145-8 in their reply.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.title: Live Women's International T20 Cricket
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: New Zealand v South Africa-3rd T20
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: New Zealand v South Africa. Coverage of the third T20 in the five-match series from Eden Park in Auckland. This is just the third T20 series between these two sides with New Zealand winning the first 3-1 in early 2020, before the second one ended 1-1 in 2023. The last time these countries met in a T20 before this series was in the 2024 T20 World Cup final, when New Zealand became Champions for the first time after a 32-run victory.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: New Zealand v South Africa-3rd T20
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: New Zealand v South Africa. Coverage of the third T20 in the five-match series from Eden Park in Auckland. These two teams have met in just three T20 series over the years with South Africa winning two of those and the other ending in a draw. The Kiwi's won their last home T20 series back in November when they beat the West Indies 3-1 in a five-match contest.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.subtitle: Murder at the U
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: When a college student is murdered, his mother questions whether the police have done enough to solve the case; an ESPN investigation reveals police have an unlikely suspect.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: ABC World News Now
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Up-to-date information on current events and news from around the world, airing in the overnight hours. Its tone is somewhat lighter than a regular news broadcast, though reports are filed from the usual ABC News correspondents. Weather and pop culture stories round out the reports.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Good Morning America First Look

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: The View

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

HBO.East.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.East.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.East.us2.title: Going the Distance
HBO.East.us2.description: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

HBO.East.us2.title: Date Night
HBO.East.us2.description: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

HBO.East.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.East.us2.title: Neighbors
HBO.East.us2.subtitle: Halloween Competition
HBO.East.us2.description: An annual Halloween competition in New Jersey divides Otis and Nelson; in Simi Valley, Ruby and Linda's fence debacle escalates.

HBO.East.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.East.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.East.us2.title: Real Time With Bill Maher

HBO.East.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.East.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.East.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.East.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.East.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.East.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.East.us2.title: Life of Pi
HBO.East.us2.description: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

HBO.East.us2.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
HBO.East.us2.description: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

HBO.East.us2.title: Sunshine Cleaning
HBO.East.us2.description: Though they once seemed to have a bright future, life seems to be passing by the Norkowski sisters. Rose (Amy Adams), once the most popular girl in high school, is a single mom and works as a maid. Norah (Emily Blunt) still lives at home with their father (Alan Arkin) and parties all the time. When Rose's married lover tells her about the lucrative field of crime-scene cleanup, she pours all her remaining resources into her new business, and recruits the squeamish Norah to help.

HBO.East.us2.title: Born to Bowl

HBO.East.us2.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
HBO.East.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

HBO.East.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.East.us2.description: Lord Rayden (Christopher Lambert) handpicks three martial artists -- federal agent Sonya Blade (Bridgette Wilson), Shaolin monk Liu Kang (Robin Shou) and action movie sensation Johnny Cage (Linden Ashby) -- and mentors them. After intense training, Rayden transports the trio to Outworld, the site of an interdimensional fighting tournament. There, the three humans must defeat the demonic warriors of the evil Shang Tsung (Cary-Hiroyuki Tagawa) -- or allow Tsung to take over the Earth.

HBO.East.us2.title: Little Miss Sunshine
HBO.East.us2.description: The Hoover family -- a man (Greg Kinnear), his wife (Toni Collette), an uncle (Steve Carell), a brother (Paul Dano) and a grandfather (Alan Arkin) -- puts the fun back in dysfunctional by piling into a VW bus and heading to California to support a daughter (Abigail Breslin) in her bid to win the Little Miss Sunshine Contest. The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's quirks cause epic problems as they travel along their interstate route.

HBO.East.us2.title: Call Me by Your Name
HBO.East.us2.description: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.East.us2.title: Dead of Winter
HBO.East.us2.description: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

HBO.East.us2.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
HBO.East.us2.description: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

HBO.East.us2.title: Inception
HBO.East.us2.description: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

HBO.East.us2.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
HBO.East.us2.description: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.East.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.East.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.East.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.East.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.East.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.East.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.East.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.East.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.East.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.East.us2.title: A Most Violent Year
HBO.East.us2.description: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

HBO.East.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.East.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.East.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.East.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Bronte novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.East.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.East.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.East.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver

HBO.East.us2.title: Spider-Man
HBO.East.us2.description: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

HBO.East.us2.title: Spider-Man 2
HBO.East.us2.description: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

HBO.East.us2.title: Spider-Man 3
HBO.East.us2.description: Peter Parker and M.J. seem to finally be on the right track in their complicated relationship, but trouble looms for the superhero and his lover. Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy him and all those he holds dear.

HBO.East.us2.description: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Beasts of the Southern Wild
HBO2.HD.us2.description: Six-year-old Hushpuppy lives with her father, Wink, in a remote Delta community. Wink is a stern taskmaster, but he is preparing his young daughter for the end of the world. When Wink falls mysteriously ill, nature seems to fall ill with him. Temperatures rise, the ice caps melt, and fearsome prehistoric beasts called aurochs run loose. Rising waters threaten to engulf their community, sending Hushpuppy in search of her long-lost mother.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: The Perfect Match
HBO2.HD.us2.description: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO2.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO2.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Billie Jean King: Portrait of a Pioneer
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Friends and family giving candid interviews include tennis legends Chris Evert and Martina Navratilova, as well as Elton John, Frank Deford, Ilana Kloss, and King's parents, brother and ex-husband Larry King.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Being Mary Tyler Moore
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Chronicling the vanguard career of Mary Tyler Moore, weaving her personal narrative with the beats of her professional accomplishments, highlighting her groundbreaking roles and the indelible impact she had on generations of women who came after her.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Uncut Gems
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Town
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants out of his criminal life, but that could threaten Claire.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Pope's Exorcist
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dune
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Call Me by Your Name
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: It's the summer of 1983, and precocious 17-year-old Elio Perlman is spending the days with his family at their 17th-century villa in Lombardy, Italy. He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Parthenope
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The beautiful Parthenope searches for love in the heady, hot summers and endless nights of her youth in Naples, Italy, as she falls for the city's many unforgettable characters and finds herself in the adventures that make up a lifetime.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mildred Pierce
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part One
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After throwing her husband out of the house, a young mother must look for work to support herself and her two daughters.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mildred Pierce
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part Two
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Mildred begins to sell homemade pies at the diner; Wally Burgan helps Mildred find a place to launch her own restaurant; Mildred impulsively joins a customer on a holiday.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mildred Pierce
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part Three
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In the wake of a tragedy, Mildred moves forward with preparations for her restaurant; Mildred hires a new piano teacher for Veda; Mildred faces off with Monty on New Year's Eve.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mildred Pierce
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part Four
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Mildred expands her Glendale eatery; Veda despairs when her piano teacher dies; a mother surprises Mildred with allegations about Veda and her son; Mildred and Veda have an emotional argument.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mildred Pierce
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Part Five
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Mildred attempts to reconcile with Veda; Veda's career as a coloratura soprano takes off; Mildred is financially strained when the Laguna restaurant slumps; Mildred returns home to a shocking revelation.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mare of Easttown
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Miss Lady Hawk Herself
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Detective Mare Sheehan revives an unsolved missing person's case amid increased community pressure; Mare attends a celebration for her legendary high school basketball win and connects with Richard, a professor who's new in town.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mare of Easttown
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Fathers
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Mare visits a grisly murder scene before informing the victim's enraged father; as a video from the night of the crime surfaces, Mare questions suspects in the case and gives an icy welcome to county Detective Colin Zabel, called in to assist.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mare of Easttown
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Enter Number Two
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: As Mare and Colin parse new physical evidence, phone records lead to an unlikely suspect; after lashing out at Helen about a possible custody fight over Drew, Mare receives some unprompted advice from Richard on how to move forward with Carrie.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mare of Easttown
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Poor Sisyphus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With Mare forced to take a backseat on the case, Colin presses a local priest about the vague circumstances that prompted his transfer to the parish; an anonymous call gives Dawn hope that Katie might still be alive.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mare of Easttown
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Illusions
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In her mandated therapy, Mare opens up about her family's history with mental health; Lori tries to get to the bottom of her son's outburst at school; Mare meets with a semi-retired source to help find a possible connection to her three cases.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mare of Easttown
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Sore Must Be the Storm
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After a heroic rescue lands her in the hospital, Mare awakes to the unshakeable pain of losing a friend. Then, given a second chance by Chief Carter, Mare reevaluates old suspects, which leads to a shocking clue.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Mare of Easttown
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: Sacrament
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: When her case takes a devastating turn, Mare's family and friends process the fallout while she attempts to find her own way forward.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Warfare
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

HBO.West.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.West.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.West.us2.title: Going the Distance
HBO.West.us2.description: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

HBO.West.us2.title: Date Night
HBO.West.us2.description: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

HBO.West.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.West.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.West.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.West.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.West.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.West.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.West.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.West.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.West.us2.title: Life of Pi
HBO.West.us2.description: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

HBO.West.us2.title: Sunshine Cleaning
HBO.West.us2.description: Though they once seemed to have a bright future, life seems to be passing by the Norkowski sisters. Rose (Amy Adams), once the most popular girl in high school, is a single mom and works as a maid. Norah (Emily Blunt) still lives at home with their father (Alan Arkin) and parties all the time. When Rose's married lover tells her about the lucrative field of crime-scene cleanup, she pours all her remaining resources into her new business, and recruits the squeamish Norah to help.

HBO.West.us2.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
HBO.West.us2.description: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

HBO.West.us2.title: Inception
HBO.West.us2.description: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. His skill has made him a hot commodity in the world of corporate espionage but has also cost him everything he loves. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

HBO.West.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.West.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.West.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.West.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.West.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.West.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.West.us2.subtitle: Halloween Competition
HBO.West.us2.description: An annual Halloween competition in New Jersey divides Otis and Nelson; in Simi Valley, Ruby and Linda's fence debacle escalates.

HBO.West.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.West.us2.description: At the U.S. Open, the first major tournament of the year in Indianapolis, Kyle Troup, AKA "The Pro with the 'Fro," sets out to repeat as bowling's "Green Jacket" winner.

HBO.West.us2.subtitle: The Go Getter

HBO.West.us2.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver
HBO.West.us2.description: Comedian John Oliver hosts an in-depth, satirical look at developments from the past seven days in news, politics and current events.

HBO.West.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.West.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Bronte novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.West.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.West.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.West.us2.description: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. He vows to use his abilities to fight crime, coming to understand the words of his beloved Uncle Ben: "With great power comes great responsibility.".

HBO.West.us2.title: Spider-Man 2
HBO.West.us2.description: When a failed nuclear fusion experiment results in an explosion that kills his wife, Dr. Otto Octavius is transformed into Dr. Octopus, a cyborg with deadly metal tentacles. Doc Ock blames Spider-Man for the accident and seeks revenge. Meanwhile, Spidey's alter ego, Peter Parker, faces fading powers and self-doubt. Complicating matters are his best friend's hatred for Spider-Man and his true love's sudden engagement to another man.

HBO.West.us2.title: Spider-Man 3
HBO.West.us2.description: Peter Parker and M.J. seem to finally be on the right track in their complicated relationship, but trouble looms for the superhero and his lover. Peter's Spider-Man suit turns black and takes control of him, not only giving Peter enhanced power but also bringing out the dark side of his personality. He must overcome the suit's influence as two supervillains, Sandman and Venom, rise up to destroy him and all those he holds dear.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Flow
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Christmas With the Kranks
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Finally alone for the holidays, Luther (Tim Allen) and Nora Krank (Jamie Lee Curtis) plan to eschew the Christmas traditions and take a cruise in the Caribbean instead. This doesn't sit well with their Christmas-obsessed neighbors Vic Frohmeyer (Dan Aykroyd) and Walt Scheel (M. Emmet Walsh), who are determined to win the annual "best decorated street" competition, and the Kranks soon find themselves social outcasts because of their lack of Christmas spirit.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Synanon Fix: Did the Cure Become a Cult?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Here Come the Dopefiends
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Recovering alcoholic Charles Dederich opens a drug rehabilitation program; Synanon, as he names it, soon attracts celebrities and non-addicts who donate their time and wealth; the community grows into a movement that expands across the country.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Synanon Fix: Did the Cure Become a Cult?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: A War on Convention
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chuck establishes "The Synanon Religion" and maintains their tax-exempt status; Chuck becomes increasingly authoritative and dictatorial; many members find themselves weighing the benefits and costs of the choices they're forced to make.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Synanon Fix: Did the Cure Become a Cult?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: What in the Hell Is Happening?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chuck's behavior becomes more belligerent and abusive; he forms a military-like boot camp for delinquent children where corporal punishment abounds; TIME Magazine publishes "Swinging at Synanon" and Chuck sues for $76 million as his paranoia grows.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Synanon Fix: Did the Cure Become a Cult?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Strap Yourself to the Mast
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1977, the Los Angeles Times reports on the nine-day abduction of Frances Winn by Synanon; Chuck spends $62,000 on guns and ammunition; sentenced to five years probation, Chuck loses everything and dies in a nursing home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Uncut Gems
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: V for Vendetta
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following world war, London is a police state occupied by a fascist government, and a vigilante known only as V (Hugo Weaving) uses terrorist tactics to fight the oppressors of the world in which he now lives. When V saves a young woman named Evey (Natalie Portman) from the secret police, he discovers an ally in his fight against England's oppressors.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Friendship
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Going the Distance
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Erin (Drew Barrymore) and Garrett (Justin Long) are very much in love. When Erin moves to San Francisco to finish her journalism degree and Garrett stays behind in New York to work in the music industry, they gamely keep the romance alive with webcams and frequent-flyer miles. But just when it seems the lovers will soon be reunited, they each score a big break that could separate them for good.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Give It a Year
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After a quick courtship, two lovers decide to tie the knot. As their first year of marriage unfolds, temptation and incompatibility put their relationship in jeopardy.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: It's Complicated
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falling in love with Jane but soon realizes that he has become part of a triangle.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Fire and Water
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1991, the murder of four teenage girls rocks the city of Austin; a lack of hard evidence soon thwarts the investigation.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Fifth Victim
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After years of false leads and wrongful arrests, new investigators take over the case and revisit a key interrogation video.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Mental Evidence
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As the investigation increasingly focuses on the young suspects, police subject them to further videotaped interrogations, which reveal contradictory and unstable versions of what happened and some confessions.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: In Your Own Time
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When new DNA evidence leads to Springsteen and Scott's release, the victims' families must grapple with the unknown.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Her Back
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Get Out
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Now that Chris and his girlfriend, Rose, have reached the meet-the-parents milestone of dating, she invites him for a weekend getaway with Missy and Dean. At first, Chris reads the family's overly accommodating behavior as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter's interracial relationship, but as the weekend progresses, a series of increasingly disturbing discoveries leads him to a truth that he never could have imagined.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Men
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: One Battle After Another
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: War for the Planet of the Apes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Caesar (Andy Serkis) and his apes are forced into a deadly conflict with an army of humans led by a ruthless colonel (Woody Harrelson). After the apes suffer unimaginable losses, Caesar wrestles with his darker instincts and begins his own mythic quest to avenge his kind. As the journey finally brings them face to face, Caesar and the colonel are pitted against each other in an epic battle that will determine the fate of both of their species and the future of the planet.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Logan
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Batman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Beasts of the Southern Wild
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Six-year-old Hushpuppy lives with her father, Wink, in a remote Delta community. Wink is a stern taskmaster, but he is preparing his young daughter for the end of the world. When Wink falls mysteriously ill, nature seems to fall ill with him. Temperatures rise, the ice caps melt, and fearsome prehistoric beasts called aurochs run loose. Rising waters threaten to engulf their community, sending Hushpuppy in search of her long-lost mother.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: An Update on Our Family
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Welcome to Our Family
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chronicles the lucrative world of YouTube vlogging, including social media archival footage of Myka and James Stauffer; Hannah Cho, an avid YouTube consumer, explains how daily videos and constant updates provide a sense of community.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: An Update on Our Family
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Damn Good Mom
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The business of family vlogging is explored; as adoption day approaches, the Stauffers post videos counting down the days.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: An Update on Our Family
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Where's Huxley?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Concerned fans turn to critics; commentators shed light on the Stauffers' catalogue of content, dissecting their lavish lifestyle and their adopted son's treatment; an update from the family results in brands dropping their sponsorship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ne Zha 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Born to mortal parents, a rebellious young demigod uses his immense powers to battle an ancient force that's bent on humanity's destruction.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The year is 1926, and Newt Scamander (Eddie Redmayne) has just completed a global excursion to find and document an extraordinary array of magical creatures. Arriving in New York for a brief stopover, he might have come and gone without incident, were it not for a No-Maj (American for Muggle) named Jacob, a misplaced magical case, and the escape of some of Newt's fantastic beasts, which could spell trouble for both the wizarding and No-Maj worlds.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Hidden Figures
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Sex and the City 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Fun, fashion and friendship continue to define the lives of Carrie, Samantha, Charlotte and Miranda. They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Monster-in-Law
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Adult Best Friends
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Katie takes her best friend, Delaney, on a nostalgic trip to their childhood hometown to tell her she's getting married. Their journey soon takes some unexpected turns courtesy of a bizarre rental homeowner, a chance encounter with a former classmate, a bachelor party, and a few potential love interests.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Broken English
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Nora Wilder (Parker Posey), a single woman, is heading deep into the doldrums as a result of disappointments in her professional and personal lives. A series of disastrous dates convinces her that love will always elude her. At a co-worker's party, she meets Julien (Melvil Poupaud), a young man from Paris, who sweeps her off her feet and invites her to France with him. Nora refuses, then wonders if she has made the biggest mistake of her life.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Enemy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Smoking Tigers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Being Mary Tyler Moore
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chronicling the vanguard career of Mary Tyler Moore, weaving her personal narrative with the beats of her professional accomplishments, highlighting her groundbreaking roles and the indelible impact she had on generations of women who came after her.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Jane Fonda in Five Acts
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A look at the life, work, activism and controversies of actress and fitness tycoon Jane Fonda.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Elizabeth Taylor: The Lost Tapes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Allowing Elizabeth Taylor ́s own voice to narrate her story, accompanied by personal photos, home movies, and clips from her iconic roles that mirror her real life challenges and triumphs while also challenging audiences to reconsider Taylor ́s legacy. Through newly discovered interviews with Taylor and unprecedented access to the movie star ́s personal archive, the film reveals the complex inner life and vulnerability of the Hollywood legend and of a life lived on a global stage.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Bronte novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Marie Antoinette
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An Austrian teenager (Kirsten Dunst) marries the Dauphin (Jason Schwartzman) of France and becomes that country's queen following the death of King Louis XV (Judy Davis) in 1774. Years later, after a life of luxury and privilege, Marie Antoinette loses her head during the French Revolution.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Blanca denuncia a Pablo por golpearla, él va a la cárcel y ella se muda con sus hijos. Diez años después, Pablo intenta recuperar a su familia pero su hijo se opone.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: ¿A qué hora regresa mi mamá?
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esther se ve obligada a dejar a su hija Macrina en casa de Cata y su esposo, sin imaginar que ellos la maltratan. Por una confusión la madre termina tras las rejas, pero sus vecinos la apoyan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La tercera pregunta del terror
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los hermanos Silvia y Pedro compiten para ganar el dinero en efectivo, pero toca despedirse del juego. Aunque Andrea y Néstor quieren duplicar sus premios, al hablar fútbol, pierden el balón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El sepulturero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lucio, un sepulturero, al saber que está cerca de la muerte se toma su pendiente de una forma muy particular. Podría cavar su propia tumba, pero prefiere hacer justicia por un amigo muerto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Si no trabaja, se vuelve loca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rocío acusa a su hija, Marisela, de ser adicta al trabajo, pero tanto ella como su hijo mayor se benefician de su esfuerzo, mientras su esposo no contribuye económicamente al hogar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tropecé de nuevo y con el mismo hombre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sandy quiere que Norman se sincere, si la relación sigue o cortan por lo sano; su falta de atención la hace dudar, puede que esté con ella por interés, tras sorprenderlo con otra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Happy Hour; Pequeño campeón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela se defiende cuando la difaman, porque en su empresa hay una habitación para que los empleados tengan sexo. Lorenzo demanda a su madre, por su culpa no pudo ser pelotero profesional.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La cirquera; Un amor haitiano
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariela quiere recuperar la custodia de su hija, pero Criss, el padre de la niña, se niega. Por otro lado, Mabel conoce a un chico haitiano con una historia de vida complicada, él la engaña.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Joselito reconoce a Camila
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de ver a Camila bailar en el Babel, Joselito confirma con una foto que ella es la mujer de Diego y exige a Jim que la traigan a su mesa. Corona y Diego se pelean por Isabel en la calle.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El silencio; El valor de la vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Fernando acusa a su madre de permitir que violaran a su hija, le exige una indemnización. July, tiene cáncer y es sostén de su familia, su pareja quiere el divorcio y que desaloje de la casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Deportación oportunista; Morcilla vegana
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rafael será deportado y pide llevarse a su hijo, quien cambió de sexo, pero la mamá se niega, quiere exponerlo en un reality. Lilian se enferma al comer morcillas hechas con sangrado menstrual.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El despertar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mauricio está enamorado de Carmen, pero su hijo se opone a esa relación. Jaime, quien se dedica a robar a escondidas de su madre, tendrá que despertar y pagar sus errores.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tropecé de nuevo y con el mismo hombre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sandy quiere que Norman se sincere, si la relación sigue o cortan por lo sano; su falta de atención la hace dudar, puede que esté con ella por interés, tras sorprenderlo con otra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muerta viva; Bebé adicta al celular
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La persona que le roba su identidad muere, y ahora parece que es ella quien quiere usurpar la identidad de una fallecida. Culpa a la cuidadora por la adicción al celular de su bebé.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Desecho familiar; Terapia engañosa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Patricio pide que la mujer de su padre inhabilitado venda la casa para pagar los gastos médicos. La mamá de Gabriela la envía a terapia para que dejara de ser gay y el terapista la tortura.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No puedo vivir sin ti
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Ana Laura y Carlos firman el divorcio, el juez le otorga a ella la custodia de su hija Yolanda. Poco después, el acosador que la persiguió por años reaparece, pero ya no se trata del mismo hombre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cuando el amor es verdadero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eladio trae a su sobrina Mercedes a su casa, lo que molesta a su esposa y a su hija Beatriz. Ellas desprecian la relación de Mercedes con el panadero, pero cuando el amor es verdadero supera todas las barreras.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amarte es mi fortaleza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Rafael fue testigo de un asesinato, tuvo que huir y dejar atrás a su esposa Berenice sin dar ninguna explicación. Pero poco después, ella descubre que está embarazada y su amor por Rafael es su mayor fortaleza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Joselito reconoce a Camila
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de ver a Camila bailar en el Babel, Joselito confirma con una foto que ella es la mujer de Diego y exige a Jim que la traigan a su mesa. Corona y Diego se pelean por Isabel en la calle.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fuera a velocidad de F1
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paty y Toña son grandes amigas y concursan para multiplicar sus premios al doble, pero deben superar una difícil pregunta. Los esposos Marysol e Ituriel quieren llevarse el dinero en efectivo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Influencer
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Fabo, un influencer que alcanzó el éxito dando consejos saludables, debe enmendar el daño causado a una seguidora, aunque sabe que debido a su gran influencia los pendientes se han viralizado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por una aventura, vaciaron mi casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lilia está preocupada porque su mamá, tiene citas con desconocidos y el último hombre con el que estuvo le vació la casa. Ella alega que la vida se vive al límite y que no va a denunciarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Adolescente maldito; Billete sucio ganado limpio
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Santiago, entrenador de tenis, pierde su trabajo porque María lo acusa de acosar sexualmente a su hijo. Por culpa de Ángel, la policía le incauta un dinero falso y con rastros de coca a Nicole.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La acosadora de hombres; La diva destronada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Kevin quiere divorciarse de Débora porque ella lo maltrata. En otro caso, Chary gana un concurso de belleza trans, pero los organizadores alegan que se equivocaron y le quitan el premio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Camila le coquetea a Joselito
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito le sigue el juego a Camila mientras los dos disfrutan de un trago. Ella cree que tiene todo bajo control y asume que él no la reconoce. Augusto se entera de quién mató a Eliseo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vendiendo el incesto; Cuarenta días de angustia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Maira anuncia en Internet que al cumplir 18 años tendrá sexo en vivo con su papá, la madre se opone. Ana manda a buscar a sus hijos en la frontera, pero los niños están a cargo de ICE.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La nieta; Divorcio ventajoso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Viviana y Mariano son una pareja de adultos mayores, pero él tiene una amante joven. Laura está inhabilitada y recibe compensación económica, su esposo quiere el divorcio y muchos beneficios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amor y perdón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Natalia pierde a su bebé por la mala praxis médica de Daniel. El destino los une tiempo después, pero para que el amor surja entre ellos él debe ser perdonado por el error que cometió.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por una aventura, vaciaron mi casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lilia está preocupada porque su mamá, tiene citas con desconocidos y el último hombre con el que estuvo le vació la casa. Ella alega que la vida se vive al límite y que no va a denunciarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Casa2; Engaño embarazoso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María no sabía que estaba divorciada, ahora espera un hijo sin derecho al patrimonio de su esposo. Una pareja contrata a una prostituta como vientre de alquiler, ella finge el embarazo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me gusta violada; En nombre de Satán
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Verónica quiere el divorcio de Andrés y que la indemnice, la drogó e hizo que la violaran. Carlos exige tratamiento psicológico para su esposa Magdalena, dice que hizo un pacto con el diablo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amigas del alma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Benjamín engaña a Amalia y queda embarazada, pierde el respaldo de sus padres. Entonces, su amiga Sandra se convierte en su único apoyo, demostrando el valor de la amistad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una injusticia contra mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hilda es acusada injustamente del asesinato de su esposo, Ramiro, y la policía la atrapa. Su mayor dolor no es estar en la cárcel, sino que Mariano, su hijo, dude de ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Confianza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tamara intenta seducir al profesor de Matemáticas y piensa que él está de acuerdo. Aníbal se convierte en su capricho, pero su actitud desencadena la desconfianza en el matrimonio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito le sigue el juego a Camila mientras los dos disfrutan de un trago. Ella cree que tiene todo bajo control y asume que él no la reconoce. Augusto se entera de quién mató a Eliseo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nervios de acero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miguel y Walfré tienen 22 años de amistad y su objetivo es ganar el viaje para celebrar en grande una despedida de soltero. Su desempeño en el juego sorprende y terminan listos para la fiesta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muere quemado; Baja costura
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Laura muere quemado, ella pide 50 mil dólares a su vecina por daños y perjuicios. Un concierto de Bruno fue viral porque se vieron sus genitales, su representante no quiere pagarle.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Giovana asegura que Daniel, el primo de su esposo, miente al decir que ella le coquetea. Anallely, la esposa de Daniel, la culpa del fracaso matrimonial y afirma estar dispuesta a hacer lo que sea por él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vagina encantada; Hall Pass
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Eva acusa a su novio Daniel de usar lubricante con éxtasis, ella da positivo en la prueba de drogas y la botan del trabajo. Carlos pide el divorcio porque Cindy le fue infiel con un famoso DJ.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mascota de moda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cristal pide el divorcio a su esposo Marco tras cinco años de matrimonio. Él compró un cerdo para que ella cambiara sus hábitos alimenticios, pero ella quiere mantenerlo como su mascota.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Todo lo que pasa antes y después de los partidos de Liga MX, con lo mejor de Chivas, Tigres y Juárez. Análisis, datos y las voces de los protagonistas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Acción de la fecha 9 del Clausura 2026 de la Liga MX. Partido reprogramado. Desde el estadio Akron, en Zapopan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi hermano perro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando su hermanito muere, su padre le regala un perro para compensarlo emocionalmente, pero ahora el niño cree que el animal es su gemelo difunto y hasta lo llama por el mismo nombre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sexo por fuera; Acoso en el parque
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hermana de Paola muere de una sobredosis, su pareja de entonces no lo evitó. Alfredo, fanático de los parques temáticos, le roza un seno a una chica sin querer, por eso le prohíben volver.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El hijo en mi vientre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayra y Francisco sueñan con ser padres, pero caen en manos de un médico inescrupuloso que los estafa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vive obsesionado conmigo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Giovana asegura que Daniel, el primo de su esposo, miente al decir que ella le coquetea. Anallely, la esposa de Daniel, la culpa del fracaso matrimonial y afirma estar dispuesta a hacer lo que sea por él.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amor en pelota; Me pertenece
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Daniel usa con su novia un juguete sexual en forma de pelota, la madre de ella lo demanda. Dariel y Karla no se ponen de acuerdo, él como donante de esperma quiere reconocer al niño.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Porque te amo, te doy; Made in China
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Karina se niega a devolver lo que recaudó para Jayzer cuando su pareja lo violentó, porque ellos volvieron. Julio contacta por redes a una china, pero resultó ser un hombre, exige que se aleje.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bebé en venta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Julissa es una adolescente embarazada que busca la forma de ocultar su situación. Una amiga la convence de vender a su bebé y así contactan a Sandra, quien está desesperada por ser madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Necesito a mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Elisa está agobiada con la maternidad y descuida a su madre, que se pierde. Elisa se siente culpable de la situación y descubre cuánto necesita a su mamá.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mensajero de amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dany y sus amigos deciden montar un negocio de mensajería especializada. Uno de sus primeros trabajos es un anuncio para Ana, pero se confunden y Pepe le entrega el mensaje equivocado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A nadie le importa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amaranta sufre tras el suicidio de su papá y su novio la introduce en el alcohol y las drogas. Angélica, su mamá, decide llevarla a terapia, así descubre que estuvo a punto de arruinar su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Caída final
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las amigas Mariela y Fernanda quieren llevarse la sala de entretenimiento, pero sufren un aparatoso tropiezo. Las primas Berenice y Angélica buscan multiplicar sus premios por dos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La última boda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amparo se enamora de Miguel, pero su hijo le demuestra que él no es lo que ella pensaba y que podría estar involucrada en un crimen. Su pendiente se convierte en un símbolo de venganza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me quita los novios
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayra acusa a su madre de querer quitarle a sus novios y asegura que la obligó a abortar. Su madre dice que le gustan los menores y que quiere disfrutar la vida porque todavía se siente joven.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Le pagué con la misma moneda
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ivonne, cansada de las infidelidades de su esposo, le hace lo mismo y se involucra con el mejor amigo de él. Leslie, su hija, se pone del lado de su padre y se distancia de ella, sin perdonarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tumba compartida; Hijos americanos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Varias familias compran un paquete funerario sin saber que tienen que compartir la misma tumba. Lucía demanda a Antonio para que le pague a las mujeres embarazadas que trajo a EE.UU.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El sobreviviente; Tatuando mulas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roberto no ha logrado superar un trauma de la niñez y por eso afecta la tranquilidad de sus hijos al sobreprotegerlos. El amigo de una tatuadora profesional la mete en problemas con un cártel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe y Joselito cara a cara
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito conoce a la Mami Chula y descubre que se trata de Circe. Ambos se amenazan a muerte porque quieren dominar el negocio del narcotráfico. Las bailarinas del Babel corren peligro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El niño o la casa; Guantes rosados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roxana exige que Jonathan, el hijo de su pareja, abandone la casa de la cual ella es copropietaria. Además, Julio es un exitoso boxeador, pero es homosexual y nadie lo sabía, reclama respeto.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Europa League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Olympique Lyon-Celta
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Es la segunda competición de la UEFA, pero siempre cuenta con equipos de primer nivel. Tras una fase liga de ocho jornadas, solo los mejores disputarán las eliminatorias por el título. La final de esta edición se disputará en el Besiktas Stadium de Estambul.
