LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Huesca - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la temporada. Sin duda, una competición con equipos de primera.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Albacete - Las Palmas
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Belmonte cierra la jornada con un Alba que busca pausa y claridad entre líneas para habilitar remate frontal. La UD pretende imponer paciencia con balón y último pase; si el Alba ajusta la pérdida y compite la estrategia, podrá sostener un partido de marcador corto.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Vorhang auf für das Oberhaus des niederländischen Fußballs: Die Eredivisie hat auch hierzulande viele Fans. Deshalb zeigt sportdigital die Highlights der aktuellen Spieltage als Erstausstrahlung. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Die teuerste und die vielleicht auch beste Liga der Welt im Mutterland des Fußballs. Alle Spiele, alle Spieler, die Trainer und jede Menge Hintergrundinfos aus den Stadien und Trainingsplätzen. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Champions League
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Manchester City – Real Madrid (Achtelfinale, Rückspiel)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: 1992 wurde der seit 1955 jährlich ausgetragene Europapokal der Landesmeister stark modifiziert und fortan Champions League genannt. Die Startplätze werden gemäß der UEFA-Fünfjahreswertung an die nationalen Ligen verteilt. Ab der kommenden Spielzeit wurde der Modus abermals verändert. Die 36 (statt bisher 32) qualifizierten Teams spielen zunächst 8 Spiele (4 davon zu Hause und 4 auswärts) in der neu geschaffenen League Phase. Die Ergebnisse laufen in eine Gesamttabelle aller 36 Teams ein. Die ersten 8 Teams sind direkt für das Achtelfinale qualifiziert, die Plätze 9-24 spielen in einem KO-Playoff um die übrigen Tickets für das Achtelfinale. (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Emmett vs. Vallejos - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to Meta APEX on Saturday, March 15 with an exciting event headlined by a critical featherweight matchup between tenured veteran Josh “CC0” Emmett and ascending Argentinian Kevin “El Chino” Vallejos. Emmett has been a mainstay in the Top 10 for several years, earning victories over the likes of Ricardo Lamas, Dan Ige and Bryce Mitchell along with challenging for the interim featherweight title at UFC 284.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS - LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Some of the best goals from Miguel de las Cuevas during his time at Sporting Gijon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 326: Holloway vs. Oliveira 2 - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 326 promises to keep the early-year momentum going as Max “Blessed” Holloway and Charles “Do Bronxs” Oliveira clash for the BMF title to close out the promotion's return to T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas on Saturday, March 8. Coming off a unanimous decision win over Dustin Poirier at UFC 318, Hawaii's Holloway looks to add a third straight BMF bout victory to his sterling resume, which includes a victory over his UFC 326 challenger back when the pair were aspiring featherweights.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 315: Muhammad vs Della Maddalena
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 315 Countdown takes an inside look at two title fights, as welterweight king Belal Muhammad attempts to defend his crown against Jack Della Maddalena, and flyweight queen Valentina Shevchenko puts her belt on the line against Manon Fiorot.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS - LALIGA TOP GOALS MIGUEL DE LAS CUEVAS
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Some of the best goals from Miguel de las Cuevas during his time at Sporting Gijon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: ASTAF Sepaktakraw AsianCup Kuala Lumpur 2025 - Final (Malaysia vs Thailand) - Regu
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ASTAF Sepaktakraw Asian Cup 2025 is set to take place from May 10 to May 18, 2025, at the prestigious Titiwangsa Indoor Stadium in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. This exciting tournament will showcase the best Sepaktakraw talent from across Asia, bringing together top teams and athletes to compete in a vibrant and dynamic environment.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Countdown - UFC 316: Dvalishvili vs O'Malley
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 316 Countdown previews two bantamweight title fights. In the main event, men's champion Merab “The Machine” Dvalishvili battles “Suga” Sean O'Malley in a rematch. In the co-main event, women's title holder Julianna Pena takes on Kayla Harrison.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: ASTAF Sepaktakraw AsianCup Kuala Lumpur 2025 - Semi-Final (Malaysia vs India) - Team Regu
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ASTAF Sepaktakraw Asian Cup 2025 is set to take place from May 10 to May 18, 2025, at the prestigious Titiwangsa Indoor Stadium in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. This exciting tournament will showcase the best Sepaktakraw talent from across Asia, bringing together top teams and athletes to compete in a vibrant and dynamic environment.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Some of the best goals from Miguel de las Cuevas during his time at Sporting Gijon.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 320: Ankalaev vs Pereira 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to Chicago with a stacked card featuring one of the most highly anticipated middleweight title fights in years, as South African champion Dricus Du Plessis faces his toughest test to date against unbeaten challenger Khamzat Chimaev. Plus a whole lot more action on UFC Reloaded

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 5
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 20
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Flashback - UFC Fight Flashback 1005: Usman vs. Edwards 2
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 278 was headlined by a rematch between long reigning middleweight king Kamaru “The Nigerian Nightmare” Usman and UFC vet Leon “Rocky” Edwards. See their fight like never before with enhanced replays and angles, new footage, and exclusive audio.

unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to Meta APEX on Saturday, March 15 with an exciting event headlined by a critical featherweight matchup between tenured veteran Josh “CC0” Emmett and ascending Argentinian Kevin “El Chino” Vallejos. unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 326: Holloway vs. Oliveira 2 - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC 326 promises to keep the early-year momentum going as Max “Blessed” Holloway and Charles “Do Bronxs” Oliveira clash for the BMF title to close out the promotion's return to T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas on Saturday, March 8. Coming off a unanimous decision win over Dustin Poirier at UFC 318, Hawaii's Holloway looks to add a third straight BMF bout victory to his sterling resume, which includes a victory over his UFC 326 challenger back when the pair were aspiring featherweights.
